summary: The South Bay's funding machine roared ahead with over $3.7 billion raised in recent weeks, led by blockbuster rounds for AI heavyweights like Rhoda AI and Mind Robotics in Palo Alto, plus major plays in chip design (SiFive in Santa Clara) and robotics (RoboForce in Milpitas). Most of the region's tech workforce is stable or growing, though a few companies are tightening belts. Check out hiring insights at San Jose State today and tomorrow if you're navigating the local job market.
